name: Autumn Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Thinly Sliced Peeled Apples, Tossed With 1/2 tsp Cinnamon and 1/3 cup Sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, cinnamon, melted margarine. Press mixture into bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese and sugar until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in vanilla.
4. Pour the mixture over the crust.
5. Toss apples with remaining cinnamon and sugar. Spread apple mixture over the cream cheese layer and sprinkle with pecans.
6. Return to oven and bake at 350 degrees F., for 1 hour and 10 minutes.
7. Remove from oven and allow to cool before removing from pan rim.
8. Chill thoroughly.
VARIATION:
Add 1/2 cup finely chopped pecans with the graham cracker crumbs for a crust variation. Continue as directed.
